messages.content: where else can i renew roadtax?
You can renew your road tax online or at JPJ offices. Would you like to add the 12-month digital road tax (RM 90) to your order, or skip it?
No problem, we can proceed without road tax. Please share your email, phone number, and address.
where else can i renew roadtax?

You can renew at JPJ, MyEG, or Pos Malaysia. Since you're already here, I can settle it instantly in the same flow without re-entering details. Want me to add the 12-month digital road tax (RM 90) now, or skip it?
Great, road tax is added. Please share your email, phone number, and address so I can send OTP next.
